recentTweets.text: What a kick off to the “Daddy of ‘Em All!” From the @CheyenneChamber Pardners N’ Prosperity brunch, to the exciting action happening at Frontier Park, it’s always wonderful to celebrate Cheyenne’s enduring western spirit. Thank you to the thousands of volunteers, business https://t.co/zFmp7QFENM

Extremism is driving the Democrat Party.

Democrats' goals:
-open borders
-defund the police
-abolish ICE & Border Patrol
-pack the Supreme Court
-abolish the Electoral College
-raise taxes on hardworking Americans

Today's Democrat Party is radical, extreme, dangerous, & scary. https://t.co/wAyMU9ZYOm

The contrast is clear. Democrats stand for high taxes, open borders, and lawlessness. Republicans stand for freedom, liberty, and American greatness.

America is worth defending, worth celebrating, and worth fighting for. That’s what Republicans are committed to do. https://t.co/w4E5deUkox

It was a pleasure to attend the final night of the @CentralWYFair and Rodeo last weekend. Special thanks to @hilltopbank for hosting a delicious pre-rodeo BBQ. It’s great to connect with so many of our Casper community leaders while also enjoying some world-class rodeo action. https://t.co/IyHxY1XXZ0

Democrats voted NO on:

- higher pay, better healthcare, & better housing for our troops
- merit-based promotions
- expanded recruitment
- a more lethal military
- ending harmful DEI mandates

Democrats are disrespecting our troops and undermining American security.

Few votes in the Senate are as important as the vote to fund our military. Every single Democrat voted to block that funding. Chuck Schumer even bragged about it.

That is the Democrat party of today. They are radical, extreme, dangerous, and scary. https://t.co/tvTVWp2mEt

Few votes in Congress are as important as the vote to fund our troops. Every single Senate Democrat voted to block that funding.

Democrats are disrespecting American troops.

Democrats are undermining American security.

Democrats are jeopardizing American strength.

Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats voted against the National Defense Authorization Act. It was designed to give our service members around the world every tool they need to win. 

Democrats are undermining our troops and jeopardizing American security.

Lindsey and I got to know each other while traveling the world visiting our service members. We shared a lot of laughs, and I'll never forget how much fun it was. These moments will stay with me forever. His friendship meant the world to me. https://t.co/xLamAmuJmB

There is nobody better to carry on Senator Lindsey Graham’s legacy than his beloved sister, Darline Graham Nordone. She will work just as hard for South Carolina as Lindsey always did. 

I look forward to serving with Darline in the United States Senate.

I am deeply saddened by the loss of my dear friend Senator Lindsey Graham. My prayers are with his family and all who loved him.

Lindsey represented South Carolina and America with pride and determination. He guided the Senate through our toughest battles while Chairman of both https://t.co/ePZG4RdYlU

The Green River Rendezvous Parade in Pinedale celebrates the traditions, history, and hardworking spirit that defines our great state. A special thank you to the Green River Rendezvous Pageant Association for all of the hard work and dedication that went into making this year’s https://t.co/NAsovC98fW

The iconic Sheridan @WYORodeo is in full swing. It was wonderful to connect with folks from across the state during the rodeo, pancake breakfast and parade. A special thank you to the WYO Rodeo Board of Directors who work all year long to host this amazing showcase of Wyoming’s https://t.co/yuzMY8FHgu

Happy Birthday, Wyoming! On this day 136 years ago, Wyoming became the 44th state in the union. I’m proud to call Wyoming home and honored to represent its wonderful people and celebrate our incredible heritage. #WyomingDay https://t.co/1HfROi6XAG

The Working Families @TaxCuts created the Rural Health Transformation Fund. It is the largest investment in rural healthcare in American history. 

This fund is designed to partner with local communities to invest in the services they need most. https://t.co/wCp80TY65h

Honored to celebrate America's 250th with a visit to the Grand Encampment Museum, where Wyoming author C.J. Box brought history to life by reading the Declaration of Independence. Today’s reading commemorates the first time the Declaration was read publicly on July 8, 1776. A https://t.co/10EUnQKTFd

.@TrumpAccounts have officially launched!

Families want their children to get ahead, not just get by. That's why Republicans' Working Families @TaxCuts created Trump Accounts. These accounts are built to kickstart the American Dream for the next generation. https://t.co/LePGea1oHN

Grateful to get to spend time at Gillette’s Independence Day Hot Dog Feed with the people who keep our lights on and the food on the table. Thanks to the Campbell County Parks and Recreation and all these hardworking volunteers for cooking and serving over 4,000 hotdogs. https://t.co/Aqqs9mlOZR

Cheyenne welcomed visitors to the Capitol to celebrate America’s 250th. From the dedication of a time capsule to a speaker series featuring Sheridan’s Hannah Mowry alongside concerts and fireworks, we were all reminded of how lucky we are to live in America. May we all take the https://t.co/J47xbHuWHd

There is nothing like celebrating America’s 250th birthday in the heart of the West. Hundreds of patriots from across Wyoming came out this weekend for the @CodyStampede parades, rodeo and Independence Day events. This year’s theme champions “250 Years of Legends, Liberty, and https://t.co/49KFtZujSN

"We are endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable Rights, among these are Life, Liberty and the pursuit of Happiness."

Today, We The People celebrate 250 years of the United States of America. Happy Independence Day!🇺🇸 https://t.co/UJMIf2wopB

RT @SenateGOP: 250 years on, America remains the greatest nation in the world. 

May God continue to bless our country and its people. http…

It was wonderful to be a part of the iconic @CodyStampede Independence Day parade and celebrate America’s 250th birthday with so many patriotic people from across Wyoming. It is the Wyoming way and the American spirit to come together to commemorate 250 years of being the land of https://t.co/usqVaNv3ow

One year ago, Republicans passed the Working Families @TaxCuts to promote the American Dream. It helped put more money into people's pockets. 97% of Americans received a tax cut this year. 

Every Democrat voted against it. Every Democrat voted to raise taxes by $4 trillion. https://t.co/ntNVpt0Miq

250 years ago, our founders signed the Declaration of Independence, & they set this nation on a bold path, founded in freedom, opportunity, & the belief that all people are created equal. We continue that work by carrying those same values forward in our states & communities.

The Working Families @TaxCuts opens more energy production onshore, offshore, and in Alaska. This is a major change from the Biden administration. 

Republicans are saving Americans money when they try to cool their home this summer. https://t.co/XUkgqhdDKr

One year ago, @SenateGOP passed the Working Families @TaxCuts. Refunds went up. Taxes went down. Working families kept more of what they earned.

Every single Democrat voted against it. Democrats voted to raise taxes by $4 trillion.
No Tax on Overtime benefited over 29 million Americans. The average deduction was over $3,100 thanks to Republicans' Working Families @TaxCuts. https://t.co/x2Do8BlKAN

It was wonderful to visit the Wyoming State Pavilion at the @Freedom250 Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C. This interactive exhibit honors the Cowboy State’s unique history, heritage, and role in shaping our nation as we celebrate 250 years of American Independence. https://t.co/hTe1vWClCr

Congratulations to Miriam Washut from Lander on winning the Presidential 1776 Award! Miriam’s deep understanding of America’s founding principles and civic knowledge make Wyoming proud. Students like her show that Wyoming is leading the way in civic education.

Minnesota is ground zero for fraud. Biden and the Democrats looked the other way.

Republicans make fighting fraud a top priority. @SenJoniErnst investigated a day care center in Minnesota that had raked in over $230,000 from @SBAgov alone and had ZERO children enrolled. https://t.co/3DVbzBxkqO

Estimates for Medicaid fraud are as much as $120 billion annually. Republicans' are fighting the war against fraud. The Working Families @TaxCuts:

✅Puts in place work requirements for Medicaid.
✅Ensures illegal immigrants do not receive taxpayer-funded healthcare.

It was a pleasure to welcome folks from Worland to Washington, D.C. last week. We had meaningful conversations about the preservation of liberty, the enduring ideals found in our Declaration of Independence, and the anticipation of celebrating the Fourth of July back home. https://t.co/A4VDkigmVg

It was great to welcome Olympian Jaelin Kauf to Washington this week. She grew up skiing in Alta, Wyoming, and represented #TeamUSA at the Winter Olympics in Milan and Beijing. Jaelin has brought home 3 silver medals in her career and made all of Wyoming proud.🥈 https://t.co/Onup5PNOmW

Washington can make it easier for businesses to grow, and for Americans to prosper, by reforming the federal permitting system. Thank you @SenArmstrong for helping lead the effort to get America building again.
.@SenateGOP just confirming @POTUS Trump’s 500th nominee. Republicans are getting nominees on the job, despite historic Democrat obstruction. https://t.co/XuYOiP5F6m

The Rural Health Transformation Fund is about delivering care where and when people need it most. Rural solutions should come from the states and local care providers. 

That's why the Working Families @TaxCuts made the largest investment in rural healthcare in American history. https://t.co/5y3pXPThm6

Rural Americans deserve access to local care that is affordable, reliable, & high quality.

Since Obamacare became law, over 100 rural hospitals have closed. Rural America deserves a better approach.

That’s why Republicans passed the $50 billion Rural Health Transformation Fund.
Our best days are ahead. 🇺🇸 #America250 https://t.co/bKgl3GXIp0

Under Biden and the Democrats, Americans paid more for energy. Energy workers in Wyoming and across the country lost good paying jobs. And America grew more dependent on foreign nations for our energy. 

Republicans' Working Families @TaxCuts cleared the way for energy dominance. https://t.co/zUKaF9Y2vH

Every Democrat voted against the Working Families @TaxCuts. They voted to raise taxes by $4 trillion.

They voted to keep the tax on natural gas. They voted to keep American energy trapped in the ground.

If Democrats had their way, Americans would be paying more for everything.

The American Legion has a deep rooted history in serving veterans and their families. It was an incredible honor to attend the Wyoming American Legion’s annual convention in Powell. Thank you to all of our veterans and service members who sacrificed and dedicated so much for our https://t.co/KRj7PiZPhh

Powell’s GT Aeronautics manufactures Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) focused on weaponized counter defense and search and rescue systems that help protect Americans and our allies. What an exceptional manufacturer to have right here in Wyoming. https://t.co/IOdjXT9SF9

Triangle X Ranch in Grand Teton National Park is celebrating its 100th anniversary this year. It was a beautiful day to celebrate with the Turner family, neighbors and friends at the ranch. https://t.co/JgsdCUhx7p

Wyoming VFW provides unwavering support for veterans across the Cowboy State. It was a pleasure to visit with and thank them for their incredible service at their annual convention in Casper. https://t.co/D71dt8kQcL

More than 50 students from across the Cowboy State are in Washington, D.C., this week for the @NationalHistory contest. These young scholars explored various historical topics through in-depth research and creative projects presented to a panel of experts. https://t.co/nPRVZvDZmw

This week, @SenLummis and I hosted Wyoming Realtors on the Hill. We had a great discussion about the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, increasing housing supply, and making homes more affordable for Wyoming families. https://t.co/KzaPK8ik3g

By some estimates, regulations add an extra $130,000 to the cost of a home. @SenatorTimScott's ROAD to Housing Act is a solution to unlock the American Dream. This bipartisan bill will increase the supply, lower the cost, and expand the ability of families to own a home. https://t.co/YwwVEphy3g

RT @SenateGOP: Senate Republicans are putting American families first. 

The Working Families Tax Cut permanently increased the child tax c…
The American Dream should not be regulated out of reach. It should be within reach for every American willing to work for it. The Senate is ready to get the ROAD to Housing Act signed into law.

Lower energy costs in America require more supply. More supply requires a permitting process that is both respectful of the environment and responsive to the nation’s energy needs. Building faster, better, cheaper and smarter is the path to lower prices. https://t.co/dR80Zz86VD

Students from the Wyoming Rural Electric Association Youth program are in Washington, D.C. today. We had a great discussion about serving Wyoming and the vital importance of our Constitution in preserving the freedoms that guide our great nation. https://t.co/zlMW7cFOMv

Wildfire season is officially here. Local control and local conditions should drive forest management. The Wildfire Prevention Act will give federal agencies the tools they need to succeed by cutting unnecessary red tape and promoting active management of our National Forests. https://t.co/9vMfi71NIc

.@VP Vance is leading the anti-fraud task force and has an incredible effort going on across the federal government. He's working with clarity and urgency. 

Republicans are protecting hardworking taxpayers and their money. We are making fighting fraud a top priority. https://t.co/iCiBOJyGen

.@POTUS Trump forced Iran to the table from a position of American strength. He has been clear:

❌Iran will not get a nuclear weapon
❌They will not have a path to a weapon
❌They are not going to be able to enrich uranium 

America is putting an end to the terrorism. https://t.co/ovfTgUjtjT

Criminals are stealing billions from hardworking taxpayers. Democrats knew about it. They treated fraud as acceptable.

Republicans are making fighting fraud a top priority. Criminals are now hearing a clear message. No amount of fraud is too small to prosecute. https://t.co/ymfrR1CLQA

Thank you to law enforcement for keeping everyone safe.

Democrats need to stop putting politics over national security. It’s time they work with us to keep Americans safe.

I know families worry about the future. They want their children to get ahead, not just get by. That's why Republicans' Working Families @TaxCuts created @TrumpAccounts. These accounts are built to kickstart the American Dream for the next generation.

.@wyoboysstate hosted a terrific group of young men from around the state in Laramie this week. What a pleasure to join them to talk about how they can give back to our state and nation. These are the leaders who will usher our nation into its next 250 years. https://t.co/3Ed1rYU3Nu

Democrats want coal to remain in the ground. They want to treat coal as something that should be regulated, taxed, and eliminated. 

Republicans believe national security begins with energy security. @POTUS Trump and Republicans are putting American families and workers first. https://t.co/8bkC51MFGC
Wyoming’s energy workers and our coal communities now have the certainty they need to do what they do best – power the country. https://t.co/hPWDH3xXjA
